title: Numbers: 1 2 3 4 5 (left hand)
description: Block 3 starts — left-hand number row. Reach up from home row.
text: 12 34 5 12345 11 22 33 44 55 a1 s2 d3 f4 g5 take 1 add 2 see 3 try 4 win 5

tips.text: 1 is left pinky reach up — above Q
2 ring, 3 middle, 4 and 5 both index (4 stretches up-right)
Return to home row after each number

tips.title: Подсказка
tips.text: Numbers are a stretch — don't lose home position

tips.target: f4 g5 take 1 add 2 see 3 try 4 win 5

character_tips.anna: Numbers stretch your fingers up two rows. Return to home immediately.
character_tips.maxim: Left-hand numbers: pinky-ring-middle-index-index. Same finger order as letters below.
character_tips.klavochka: Counting numbers — like learning to count again, but with fingers! 🌟
